columns.name: active
columns.description: Operational status of the airline, indicating whether it is active or inactive.

columns.name: airline_name
columns.description: Name of the airline representing its unique identity.

columns.name: callsign
columns.description: Unique callsign used to identify the airline during radio communications.

columns.name: country
columns.description: Country where the airline is based or registered.

columns.name: iata_code
columns.description: IATA code associated with the airline, used for ticketing and identification.

columns.name: icao_code
columns.description: ICAO code associated with the airline for international identification.

columns.name: airport_name
columns.description: Name of the airport or facility serving travelers and cargo.

columns.name: city
columns.description: City where the airport is located.

columns.name: country
columns.description: Country where the airport is located.

columns.name: elevation
columns.description: Height of the airport above sea level, measured in feet.

columns.name: iata_code
columns.description: IATA code uniquely identifying the airport, including heliports.

columns.name: icao_code
columns.description: ICAO code providing international identification for the airport.

columns.name: latitude
columns.description: Geographical coordinate indicating the north-south position of the airport.

columns.name: longitude
columns.description: Geographical coordinate indicating the east-west position of the airport.

columns.name: airline_name
columns.description: Name of the airline operating the route.

columns.name: arrival_airport_code
columns.description: IATA code of the airport where the flight terminates.

columns.name: arrival_airport_name
columns.description: Name of the airport where the flight terminates.

columns.name: arrival_country
columns.description: Country where the arrival airport is located.

columns.name: departure_airport_code
columns.description: IATA code of the airport where the flight commences.

columns.name: departure_airport_name
columns.description: Name of the airport where the flight commences.

columns.name: departure_country
columns.description: Country where the departure airport is located.

columns.name: operation_focus
columns.description: Operational emphasis of the route, such as passenger transport or cargo logistics.

columns.name: route_type
columns.description: Nature of the route, specifying whether it is domestic or international.
